reasoning: The order notes contain a high-priority fraud alert for this customer. Lisa Anderson has a 90% refund rate with 16 refunds in the last 33 days, all claiming non-delivery despite tracking confirmation. While the current claim is 'different product received', the established pattern of fraudulent behavior and the explicit instruction in the order notes to not process and escalate to Loss Prevention necessitates a denial of the refund at this stage.
